product.name: Dove Hair Boost Nourishment Shampoo - Anti-Hairfall

offers.description: Buy 1 Dove Hair Boost Nourishment Shampoo - Anti-Hairfall @ $7.35

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• Volume & Rich Complex
Nourish and revitalise hair to help enhance hair volume without any sticky sensation*. 90% agree hair feels volumised all day long*

• Camellia Oil Force
Powered by Tsubaki’s signature ingredient to deeply moisturise, repair damage, reduce frizz and breakage, and hydrate the scalp for healthier hair and scalp.

• Damage-Sensor Technology
Detects and attaches to damaged areas of the hair to deliver repairing effect.

Transform flat, lifeless hair into full, thick, and bouncy strands instantly. Specially formulated to lift and add volume from the roots, this shampoo gently cleanses for volumised, shiny hair with bounce. No waiting required—see and feel the difference after just one wash!

• Suitable for:
- Fine, Flat & Limp Hair
- Damaged hair caused by chemical treatments, heat and styling

Note:
• Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse eyes immediately with cold or lukewarm water.
• After use, please close the cap.
• Not to be used for children under three years of age.

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Peg-60 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Polyquaternium-10, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Aspartic Acid, Camellia Japonica Seed Oil, Polyquaternium-11, Sodium Dilauramidoglutamide Lysine, Taurine, Phytosteryl/Octyldodecyl Lauroyl Glutamate, Phytosteryl Macadamiate, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Squalane, Peg-2 Laurate, Sodium Sulfate, Dipropylene Glycol, Isostearyl Alcohol, Salicylic Acid･Disodium Edta, Laurtrimonium Chloride, Citric Acid, Tocopherol, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Benzoate, Fragrance (Parfum)
metaData.Key Information:
• Instant volume boost in 1 use* - improves flat & lifeless hair
• Get 100 hours of hair volume from the roots** and achieve salon-quality hair at home with zero waiting time!

*Based on consumer test , 32 respondents (Volume SP), 60 respondents (Volume CD), 63 respondents (Volume TM), China, Feb-Mar 2024.
**Based on clinical test (volume of crown hair roots), 20 females aged 20-59, Korea, Nov 2023
metaData.Preparation: Hold cap and turn nozzle in to unlock the pump, push pump a few times until  shampoo is dispensed. Apply to wet hair and gently massage into a thick lather. Rinse hair thoroughly with water.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place. Do not leave product in direct sunlight or exposed to high temperature

metaData.Ingredients: Water / Aqua / Eau, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Ammonium Lauryl Sulfate, Cocamide Methyl Mea, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Fragrance / Parfum, Caffeine, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Salicylate, Dimethicone, Sodium Chloride, Menthol, Glycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Cetyl Alcohol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Caprylyl Glycol, Sodium Citrate, Citric Acid, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Trihydroxystearin, Sodium Metaphosphate, Peg-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, Dicaprylyl Ether, Amyl Cinnamal, Hexyl Cinnamal, Benzyl Salicylate, Climbazole, Ppg-2 Hydroxyethyl Cocamide, Polyquaternium-11, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Disodium Edta, Glyceryl Stearate, Linalool, Limonene, Laureth-23, Laureth-3, 1,2-Hexanediol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Tetrasodium Edta, Carbomer, Dextrin, Hydrolyzed Extensin, Butylene Glycol, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, Rosa Damascena Flower Extract, Saccharomyces Cerevisiae Extract, Lactic Acid, Tocopherol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Thuja Orientalis Seed Extract, Camellia Japonica Seed Oil, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Camellia Sinensis Seed Oil, Panax Ginseng Root Water, Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice) Root Extract, Xylitylglucoside, Propanediol, Anhydroxylitol, Xylitol, Hydroxypropyl Cyclodextrin, Glycine Max (Soybean) Seed Extract, Bacillus/Soybean Ferment Extract
metaData.Key Information:
Hair strength care customized solution
• Enhance hair volume from the roots - confidence in hair volume even after 48 hours
• Prevent hair breakages
• Added anti-hair loss benefit
• Key ingredients:
- premium anti-aging ginseng from hair loss lab's 40-year legacy.
- MDDS-certified hair loss relief with the power of caffeine.
- Innovative rice-derived hydrolyzed extension for optimal hair health.
• Mild for scalp – low ph
• Elegant woody fragrance
• Rich and dense foam for deep cleansing
metaData.Preparation:
How to use:
1. Release proper amount onto your hand and gently massage your hair and scalp.
2. After 2-3 minutes wash off with lukewarm water.


Warnings:
1. Wash off immediately when it gets into your eyes
2. Not washing off after usage can cause hairloss or bleaching
3. If abnormal symptoms or side effects such as red spots, swelling, or itching is noticed when using product or after use from direct sunlight, consult with physician
4. Limit use on broken or wounded skin
metaData.Storage Information:
1. Keep out of reach of children
2. Keep away from direct sunlight
3. When product is spilled on the floor, be cautious of slipperiness and immediately wipe it off with water.
